case_title: AMERICAN MANUFACTURERS MUTUAL INSURANCE COMPANY,AS VS. STATE OF CALIFORNIA DEPARTMENT OF TRANSPORTATION et al

docket_entries.description: LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT STATE OF CALIFORNIA DEPARTMENT OF TRANSPORTATION DEMURRER TO PLTF'S COMPLAINT. NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING - SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND 3RD CAUSE OF ACTION TO PLEAD DEFENDANTS PLAN OR POLICY DECISION. OVERRULE-4TH CAUSE OF ACTION CAN'T DETERMINE WHETHER MANUAL IS MANDATORY & MUST TAKE ALLEGATION AS TRUE. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER. HON. RONALD E. QUIDACHAY. REPORTER: JOE VICKSTEIN, CSR #4780
